function.name: add-new-lines-to-file
function.description: Add new lines to an existing file. Use this tool when updating code/config/etc files and adding **completely new** lines, not modifying existing lines. You MUST read any files you intend to update with line numbers enabled so you're able to correctly generate a call to this tool. The updated file will be returned with line numbers added to the start of each line like `<num>: <content>`.

insertAfter.description: The new lines will be inserted AFTER this line. You MUST have read the file with line numbers enabled.

newLines.description: The new lines that will be inserted.

relativePath.description: The file path whose content will be updated, relative to the current directory.
